title: Taxes; Prescription
doc_html:
§16. Taxes; Prescription

            Section 16. Taxes, except real property taxes, and licenses shall prescribe in three years after the thirty-first day of December in the year in which they are due, but prescription may be interrupted or suspended as provided by law.
doc_text:
§16.  Taxes; Prescription
Section 16.  Taxes, except real property taxes, and licenses shall prescribe in three
years after the thirty-first day of December in the year in which they are due, but prescription
may be interrupted or suspended as provided by law.
